name: telic
description: Compile coding requests into permission-bounded, evidence-linked workflows with a local artifact ledger.

interface.longDescription: Compile rough coding intent into repository-grounded task contracts, execute within explicit permissions, and audit every completion claim against evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use Telic to diagnose this project without making changes.
Use Telic to analyze and fix this bug with evidence.
Use Telic to turn this request into a verified plan.
